caption: The video features three individuals seated on wooden chairs on a stage, engaged in a discussion. The setting appears to be a formal event or panel discussion, possibly related to technology, as suggested by the large computer motherboard displayed prominently in front of them. The man on the left, dressed in a white shirt and dark pants, is gesturing with his hands, indicating he might be speaking or explaining something. The woman in the center, wearing a black t-shirt and black pants, is attentively listening, with her hands clasped together. The man on the right, dressed in a gray suit, is also listening intently, with one leg crossed over the other. The background includes purple lighting and a large screen, adding to the professional ambiance of the event.
